subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1914
subcodes.first_line: Consider the foolishness of the governments of Iran and the Ottoman Empire in how they banished His Holiness Baha'u'llah from Iran
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحظه جنون دولت ایران و دولت عثمانی را بفرمائید که به چه طرزی حضرت بهاءالله
